subject: A blond SSJ-form figure performing the Mafuba sealing technique, hand outstretched
description: A figure with golden-yellow hair in the Super Saiyan form stands with one hand extended forward in a commanding, technique-casting gesture. The figure wears a jacket and has a red cloth or scarf detail visible at the collar or neck area. The energy around the hand is white and circular, suggesting a spiraling or containment technique. The background is a bright energy-saturated field. The 'Mafuba' is the Evil Containment Wave sealing technique historically associated with King Piccolo and Master Roshi but was also famously used by Trunks in the Future Trunks Saga. The red scarf and jacket detail are consistent with Future Trunks' visual design. No sealing vessel or bottle is clearly visible in the frame.
foreground: golden-haired figure in jacket with red scarf, hand extended in sealing gesture
vision_uncertainty: character-identity-uncertain — jacket and red-scarf consistent with Trunks but face not fully clear
